title: Current changes check karna
use_case: Branch, staged/unstaged/untracked files check karne ke liye.
output_explanation: Command ke output me requested information/result show hota hai. Flags ke hisaab se output change ho sakta hai.

title: Branches list karna
output_explanation: Command ke output me requested information/result show hota hai. Flags ke hisaab se output change ho sakta hai.

title: All branches dekhna
use_case: Local + remote branches list karne ke liye.
output_explanation: Command ke output me requested information/result show hota hai. Flags ke hisaab se output change ho sakta hai.

title: New branch create/switch karna
use_case: New branch banake usme switch karne ke liye.
output_explanation: Command ke output me requested information/result show hota hai. Flags ke hisaab se output change ho sakta hai.

title: Branch switch karna
use_case: Existing branch par switch karne ke liye.
output_explanation: Command ke output me requested information/result show hota hai. Flags ke hisaab se output change ho sakta hai.
warning: Uncommitted changes conflict kar sakte hain.

title: Changes stage karna
use_case: All current changes commit ke liye stage karne ke liye.
output_explanation: Command ke output me requested information/result show hota hai. Flags ke hisaab se output change ho sakta hai.
warning: Unwanted files stage na ho, status check karo.

title: Commit create karna
use_case: Staged changes ka commit banane ke liye.
output_explanation: Command ke output me requested information/result show hota hai. Flags ke hisaab se output change ho sakta hai.
warning: Clear message likho. Secrets commit mat karo.

title: Unstaged diff dekhna
use_case: Working tree changes compare karne ke liye.
output_explanation: Command ke output me requested information/result show hota hai. Flags ke hisaab se output change ho sakta hai.

title: Staged diff dekhna
use_case: Commit se pehle staged changes review karne ke liye.
output_explanation: Command ke output me requested information/result show hota hai. Flags ke hisaab se output change ho sakta hai.

title: Commit history dekhna
use_case: Compact branch history visualize karne ke liye.
output_explanation: Command ke output me requested information/result show hota hai. Flags ke hisaab se output change ho sakta hai.

title: Remote updates fetch karna
use_case: Remote branches/commits local me fetch karne ke liye.
output_explanation: Command ke output me requested information/result show hota hai. Flags ke hisaab se output change ho sakta hai.

title: Remote changes pull karna
use_case: Remote branch ke changes current branch me merge/rebase karne ke liye.
output_explanation: Command ke output me requested information/result show hota hai. Flags ke hisaab se output change ho sakta hai.
warning: Conflicts aa sakte hain. Pehle status clean rakho.

title: Branch push karna
use_case: Local commits remote branch par push karne ke liye.
output_explanation: Command ke output me requested information/result show hota hai. Flags ke hisaab se output change ho sakta hai.
warning: Wrong branch push na ho verify karo.

title: Changes temporary save karna
use_case: Uncommitted changes temporarily side me rakhne ke liye.
output_explanation: Command ke output me requested information/result show hota hai. Flags ke hisaab se output change ho sakta hai.
warning: Untracked files ke liye -u use karo.

title: Stash apply/remove karna
use_case: Latest stash changes wapas lane ke liye.
output_explanation: Command ke output me requested information/result show hota hai. Flags ke hisaab se output change ho sakta hai.

title: Last commit undo keep changes
use_case: Last commit remove karna but changes staged rakhna.
output_explanation: Command ke output me requested information/result show hota hai. Flags ke hisaab se output change ho sakta hai.
warning: Shared branch par history rewrite carefully karo.

title: Remote URLs dekhna
use_case: Repository remote origin URLs verify karne ke liye.
output_explanation: Command ke output me requested information/result show hota hai. Flags ke hisaab se output change ho sakta hai.

title: GitHub PR create karna
use_case: GitHub CLI se pull request create karne ke liye.
output_explanation: Command ke output me requested information/result show hota hai. Flags ke hisaab se output change ho sakta hai.

title: PR status check karna
use_case: Current repo ke PR status check karne ke liye.
